summary: First end-to-end test pass for Zamn Naturals. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed against all required endpoints (auth, products, categories, settings, upload, orders, admin guards, COD enforcement). Frontend: home/category/product/cart-badge/checkout-payment/admin-login/admin-dashboard all render correctly. CRITICAL bug: the cart is wiped on every hard browser refresh because CartContext writes [] to localStorage on mount before it reads. Order placement, admin login, and admin tabs work.

minor.issue: backend/.env CORS_ORIGINS='*' falls through to FRONTEND_URL (502dfeb4-...preview...) which does NOT match the actual frontend host (herbal-luxe-3.preview...). With allow_credentials=True the browser cannot set httpOnly cookies cross-origin. Login still works because the frontend uses Bearer-token localStorage fallback, but cookie-based auth is effectively broken in this deployment.
Returns 200 on create instead of 201 (minor REST nit).

ui_bugs.issue: Cart is emptied on every hard page reload. The component initializes useState([]) and then uses two effects — the second (write) effect runs on mount and overwrites localStorage with '[]' before the first (read) effect's setItems can commit. Reproduced: add to cart → localStorage holds the item → press F5 → localStorage becomes '[]' and Cart page shows 'Your cart is empty'. Fix: initialize state lazily, e.g. useState(() => { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('zamn_cart')) || []; } catch { return []; } }) and remove the read-effect.

action_items: Fix CartContext race condition that wipes localStorage on page reload (use lazy useState initializer).
Align backend CORS_ORIGINS (or FRONTEND_URL) with the actual public frontend host so httpOnly cookies are usable; today only Bearer fallback works.
critical_code_review_comments: CartContext.jsx uses an unsafe init pattern (useState([]) + read effect + write effect) — write effect fires on first commit and clobbers localStorage. Lazy initializer is the fix.
server.py CORS resolution logic ignores CORS_ORIGINS='*' and silently falls back to FRONTEND_URL; document or simplify (allow '*' only when allow_credentials=False).
POST /api/categories and POST /api/products return 200 instead of 201 for created resources.
Order creation does not decrement product stock — acceptable for MVP but worth flagging.
seed_data_creation: Backend already seeds 8 demo products, 33 categories, default settings, and admin user on startup. Tests create/delete TEST_ prefixed resources and restore payment_methods after toggling.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the regression suite — runs in ~5s. The cart reload bug is reproducible by: open site, add any product to cart, hit browser refresh on /cart — should show empty. After the fix, verify localStorage 'zamn_cart' persists across reload and the cart page lists items. Also verify the full checkout flow (fill form + Place Order) shows ZN- order_number confirmation; this was blocked in UI testing by the cart bug.
